name: uts-compute
description: MCP server for UTS HPC and UTS iHPC experiment workflows: job planning, autonomous conformance-gated submission, monitoring, fixed-file transfers, and artifact collection.

config_path.title: UTS profiles file
config_path.description: Absolute path to your YAML profiles file (sets UTS_COMPUTING_CONFIG). Leave empty to use the bundled example profiles. An absolute path is required to use real accounts: ${__dirname} is NOT expanded inside this default field, so the server resolves the bundled example from its own location whenever this is empty.

approval_token.title: Approval confirmation token
approval_token.description: Optional. A token you choose to gate resource-intensive operations (cancel, artifact cleanup, state migration, approval decisions). Leave empty to leave these operations gated/unavailable. The token is used only by this local MCP server and is never sent to external services.
